office_does: The prosecuting attorney prosecutes crimes, advises county government, and represents the county in civil matters.
race_blurb: Two current deputy prosecutors, Jodi Hammond and Patricia Todd, face private attorney Aaron Reiman.

candidates.summary: Reiman is an Ellensburg private-practice attorney; the dossier contains no detailed current platform.

experience.basis: He brings legal experience but no documented county-prosecutor-office record.

candidates.summary: Hammond is a current Kittitas County deputy prosecutor; the dossier contains no detailed current platform.
highlights: Serves as a county deputy prosecutor [S2].

experience.basis: Current service as a county deputy prosecutor supplies a directly relevant institutional record.

candidates.summary: Todd is a current Kittitas County deputy prosecutor; the dossier contains no detailed current platform.
highlights: Serves as a county deputy prosecutor [S2].
